rows.label: tev072602_MSG0001
rows.name:
We have assembled to discuss
how best to proceed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072602_MSG0002
rows.name:
But we've already waited an excessive
amount of time, and Sun'celeg has yet
to arrive! What's become of him?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072602_MSG0003
rows.name:
Lately, my Ovah has been astir over
something. Could this have been the cause?[ST:wait ]
